name: Vvveb CMS - No Database
tagline: Powerful and easy to use cms to build websites, blogs or ecommerce stores.. Enter your Vvveb Configuration parameters and click on next. A Vvveb container wil
description:
Powerful and easy to use cms to build websites, blogs or ecommerce stores.. Enter your Vvveb Configuration parameters and click on next. A Vvveb container wil


_Template derived from caprover/one-click-apps (caprover@bd357c9, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  vvveb-only-vvveb:
    image: vvveb/vvvebcms:php8.3-fpm-alpine
    volumes:
      - vvveb-only-vvveb-data:/var/www/html
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      DB_ENGINE: mysqli
      DB_HOST: xxx
      DB_DATABASE: vvveb
      DB_USER: vvvebuser
      DB_PASSWORD: ceb3d464b934f633
    ports:
      - 42135:80
volumes:
  vvveb-only-vvveb-data: null
